metadata.note: Movement sequence reconstructed from FEI D-PSG-2009-2026. Verify markers and directives against official 2026 PDF before production use.

tests.name: Prix St. Georges

test_info.trot_note: All trot work to be ridden sitting

tests.purpose: To test that the horse is supple, loose and correctly on the aids; shows self-carriage and impulsion; demonstrates correct and balanced execution of all movements.

movements.description: Enter collected canter. Halt, immobility, salute. Proceed collected trot
movements.directives: Straightness on centerline; quality and regularity of canter; quality of halt; immobility; attentiveness; transition to trot
Bend and balance in turn; quality and regularity of collected trot
Clear lengthening of stride and frame; regularity; impulsion; straightness; upward and downward transitions
Quality and regularity of collected trot; balance in corners
Regularity and quality of trot; bend; alignment; angle; crossing of legs; balance and fluency
Willing, calm transition; regularity, quality, overtrack of medium walk
Regularity and quality of walks; maximum ground cover with overtrack, allowing complete freedom to stretch the neck forward and downward; straightness; willing transitions
Willing, calm transition; regularity, quality, engagement of collected walk

movements.description: Half pirouette left. Proceed collected walk
movements.directives: Bend; regularity of walk; size; balance; engagement; willing transition out

movements.description: Half pirouette right. Proceed collected walk
movements.directives: Bend; regularity of walk; size; balance; engagement; willing transition out
Regularity, quality, and engagement of collected walk
Willing transition; regularity and quality of trot; shape and size of volte; bend; balance
Regularity and quality of trot; bend; alignment; angle; crossing of legs; balance and fluency
Regularity and quality of trot; shape and size of volte; bend; balance
Regularity and quality of trot; bend; alignment; angle; crossing of legs; balance and fluency
Willing, balanced transition; quality and regularity of canter
Regularity and quality of canter; bend; alignment; angle; balance and fluency
movements.remarks: Flying change on reaching the track at F

movements.directives: Regularity and quality of canter; bend; alignment; angle; balance and fluency
movements.remarks: Flying change on reaching the track at H

movements.description: Half pirouette right in canter. Collected canter
movements.directives: Bend; size (3-4 strides); regularity; engagement and uphill tendency; balance; willing transition
Regularity and quality of canter; straightness; rhythm; expression of each change; willing, fluent transitions

movements.description: Half pirouette left in canter. Collected canter
movements.directives: Bend; size (3-4 strides); regularity; engagement and uphill tendency; balance; willing transition
Regularity and quality of canter; straightness; rhythm; expression of each change; willing, fluent transitions
Quality and regularity of collected canter; balance and self-carriage in counter canter
Clear lengthening of stride and frame; regularity; impulsion; straightness; upward and downward transitions
Willing, balanced transition; quality and regularity of collected canter; balance in corners
Bend and balance in turn; regularity and quality of canter; willing, balanced transition; straightness; attentiveness; immobility
movements.remarks: Leave arena at A in walk.

collective_marks.description: Desire to move forward; elasticity of the steps; suppleness of the back; engagement of the hindquarters
Willing cooperation; harmony; attention and confidence; acceptance of bit and lateral and diagonal aids; straightness; lightness of forehand and ease of movements
Alignment; posture; stability; weight placement; following mechanics of the gaits

collective_marks.category: Rider's correct and effective use of aids
collective_marks.description: Clarity; subtlety; independence; accuracy of test

verify_before_production: Confirm total movement count against official 2026 PDF
Confirm coefficient movement numbers — database lists 5, 10, 13, 14, 18, 20; verify against PDF
Confirm half pirouette in walk exact markers (movements 9 and 10)
Confirm counter canter placement and pattern (movement 23)
Confirm 4-tempi count (5 changes) and 3-tempi count (5 changes)
Confirm entry is collected canter — correct for PSG
Check 2026 PDF for any revisions from 2009 version
